since_last: 13% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.48%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 13% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.40% · Gold -1.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 13% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.48%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.48%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at -7.64%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.25%, SAP +2.77%, NOW +1.63%, MSFT +1.27%, CRM +1.24%. Laggards: CEVA -7.64%, MU -7.51%, ASML -6.86%, MRVL -6.78%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.19% at $149.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
